brief_justification: Paper A's machinery is geometric/topological mirror symmetry on Calabi-Yau 3-folds — hyperkahler intermediate Jacobians, Rozansky-Witten theories, and SYZ transformations exchanging A- and B-branes; Paper B's machinery is financial asset pricing — recovering a stochastic discount factor from S&P 500 option prices via time-varying stochastic volatility to predict the equity premium. There is no role-for-role correspondence: the SYZ/brane duality and the SDF-from-options estimation share neither a governing equation, transition, nor transferable structure beyond both loosely invoking a 'duality/pricing' notion, so no coherent mapping can be built.
